instructions:
1. Freeze sirloin for 30-60 min then slice thin.
2. Add marinade ingredients, rub in, and leave 15 min.
3. Prep sauce: 1tbsp soy, 1 dark soy, 2 oyster, 1 sugar.
4. Stir fry veg and remove.
5. High heat fry beef 1-2 min, remove. 
6. Fry ginger garlic paste, add beef, cooked veg, mix. Add 1tbsp wine. Add sauce.

For Mongolian add carrot sticks, bean sprouts, mushroom, tofu, onion sliced, plus soy, tomato, wine, sesame oil, garlic ginger. Black bean sauce, chili sciratcha. 
Cook all ingredients separately with salt and soy. Then mix together add splash sauce. Garnish pineapple, sesame seed, scallions.

Kenji beef stir fry recipe.

title: Maze Grill Cauliflower Salad

instructions:
1. Render the bacon slowly in a nonstick pan, add just a drizzle of oil. About 10 min.
2. Fill a pot with water, salt generously and bring to boil. Add pasta, and set timer for the recommended time.
3. In a bowl whisk egg yolk. Add most of parmesan, leaving some for garnish, and mix with spatula. Grind pepper to taste.
4. Tilt the pan and separate the oil from bacon. Remove the bacon onto paper towel on a plate.
5. Add a table spoon of the bacon fat and another of olive oil into the bowl and mix it. 
6. When pasta is al dente, add 1-2 spoons of the cooking water into egg-parm and mix quickly. It should be a soupy paste at this point, so easier to add spaghetti next.
7. Reserve a cup of the starchy liquid. Drain and add pasta and most of bacon into the bowl, mix rigorously to emulsify. 
Add more water to bring to saucy consistency. Make it slightly more runny than desired as it will continue to absorb and dry up on the plate.
8. Place on plate, garnish with remaining bacon, Parmesan cheese and pepper and enjoy.
ingredients:
100g spaghetti
1 egg yolk
30g parmigiano grated
30g guanciale bacon
title: Carbonara

title: Butter Chicken

instructions:
1. Marinate chicken for 30 mins with ingredients upto potato. 
2. Cut potato into chunks, skin on, add to pot of cold water just covering them. Bring to boil and rapid simmer about 10 min until cooked. Sharp knife should easily pierce. Drain and set aside.
3. In a wok add sliced onion to oil, fry until softened. Add curry powder, stir for a minute.
4. Add chicken, turn and cook on medium high for 5 min. Does not need to be fully cooked at this point.
5. Add potatoes, coconut milk and chicken soup and mix through. Cook on medium low for another 10 min. 
Enjoy with white rice.

Optionally add to oven dish, cover with Parmesan cheese, and broil for 3-5 minutes.

https://youtu.be/RBtjK_B5_Sc?si=gVh_peElIOfRNS00
ingredients:
1 kg chicken thighs boneless
1 tbsp veg oil
1 tbsp cornstarch 
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp ginger juice
1 tsp Xiao Ching wine
1 tsp White pepper
1 tsp salt
chicken powder
red potato
2 tbsp veg oil
1 small onion
1 tbsp madras curry powder
1 can coconut milk
1/2 can condensed chicken soup
title: Portuguese Chicken 🇲🇴🇵🇹

instructions:
Cover leaves in boiling water for 2 min, then remove.
Mix all ingredients, adding around 1/4 cup of water to soften mixture.
To the bottom of a pot, place open leaves to cover.
Wrap dolmas individually, and lay tightly into a pot. Continue in layers.
Place more open flat grape leaves.
Add enough water to cover. And place a small plate to hold them down tight.
Bring to boil and simmer covered for 40min.
Serve with sour cream or yogurt.

500g ground beef
grape leaves
50g butter
1/2 onion
1 tbsp rice
1 bunch coriander
1 bunch dill
1 tbsp dried mint
1/2 tsp cinnamon
7g salt and pepper

2. Start on non stick pan, high heat, color 2 sides, 1-2 minutes each. Move to second pan on low on a light side, up to 5 min, while browning the rest.
3. Lay on tray, and place under the broiler to char further. Flip once. Avoid drying, should remain light pink in the middle.

title: Lüle Kebab

instructions:
1. Combine Chicken with marinade ingredients and set aside for at least 1 hour. Lemongrass should be cut large and bruised.
2. Heat 1/2 tbsp oil in a fry pan over medium heat. Add chicken with marinade, reserve half the liquid to add later. Cook each side until dark brown – about 10 minutes in total. Keep turning and adding some liquid as needed. Result should be shiny and juicy.
3. Meantime prepare vegetable toppings like cucumber, carrots, lettuce, bean sprouts and coriander. Nuoc Cham and peanut sauce. Also soak noodles 3-4 minutes, then rinse with cold water to prevent sticking.
4. Chicken should be ready. Remove, let cool slightly and slice into strips. 
5. Assemble as individual bowls, rice wrap or put everything separately for self serve.

https://www.recipetineats.com/vietnamese-chicken-noodle-bowl/#h-what-goes-in-lemongrass-nbsp-chicken

1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp brown sugar
1 tbsp vegetable oil
Rice noodles

instructions:
Prepare rice with boil, 20min, 10 min rest method. Cool and mix in a few sprinkles of sugar, rice vinegar, and salt.
Cook salmon gently, keep juicy. Cool and mix with a little soy, mirin, pepper, and furikake. Optional sciracha.
Prepare tuna with mayo, soy and greens for crunch. 
Make sure fillings are not liquid, to avoid spill.
Layer into triangles, first bottom, the filling and rice around it, then cover top.
Should make 10 onigiri.
ingredients:
1.5 japanese round rice
125g salmon
Mirin
Soy
Furikake
100g canned tuna
Coriander stalks or celery
1tbsp soy

1tbsp tuna
